Title: Direct Cybernetic Install
Description:
A quality-of-life mod that adds cybernetic management directly to the inventory menu. Unbalanced, duh.
Becoming Nook's interface is annoying to deal with. This is mainly to bypass that.
Right click cybernetics either in inventory or in your character slots.
• Works with all base game and modded cybernetics
• Safe to add to existing saves
• No conflicts with other mods

GitHub: https://github.com/SattaRIP/CavesOfQud-DirectCyberInstall
Support my mods on Patreon: patreon.com/mythraps
